en.value:
1. PHCe services delivery systems strengthened and aligned with PHC principles through SOP development, training and technical support.
2. Organization and management of hospitals.
3. District public health management enhanced.
4. Quality of health services and patient safety improved.
5. Health Library strengthened.
6. Strengthened integrated approach of EHCS supported by the partners.
7. Public Private Partnership (PPP) strenghened.
8. Sgtrengthened of instituions and management capacities in line of health sector decentralization as health reform initiatives.
9. Implementation of Phase II of IHP plans activities among EDP in health sectors.
10. IHP implementation to strengthen donor coordination and align with national health plan including further support to IHP+ road map activities and support to NHSP II development.
11. Strengthened National Health Account on health system management
12. National standards and guidelines revised, developed and implemented.
13. Access to EDM improved through revision, development and implementation of manuals and guidelines to the national medicine policy.
14. Revision and implementation of national standard and guidelines on projmoting traditional medicine.
15. Better use of essential medicine advocated.

en.full: SENEP1003827 - To improve health services through better governance, financing, staffing and management, to improve knowledge, management and information technology and the use of essential medicinal products

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
